summary: Iteration 7: Verified Daw.jsx refactor (2554 -> 2019 lines, -535 LOC). All 13 new files under /app/frontend/src/components/daw/ and /modals/ resolve correctly with NO regression. App loads cleanly (title 'RIBA - Bantu Digital Audio Workstation', 0 page errors). All 9 Pro Tools menus (File, Edit, Track, Event, AudioSuite, Tools, View, Setup, Help) open via data-testid='menu-{key}' and render their submenus (6 absolute-positioned dropdowns per click). All 8 extracted modals open correctly: Mixer (title 'Mixer · All Tracks'), Setup/Playback (Refresh button), GM 128 (exactly 128 options, Apply closes), Plugins, Manual, Dream History, BantuGrid (5 styles dropdown), Mastering. BONUS: ESC-to-close newly added in Modal.jsx works (verified on Mixer modal -- title disappears after Escape). Critical regression: MIDI track + Bantu Grid shows 'Piste cible' text bound to the new track (confirmed via inner_text scan). AudioSuite > Reverse Audio and Event > Automatic Tempo Detection both still callable without crash (RIBA brand remains visible, status bar shows 'Select an audio track first'). Backend regression: 16/16 pytest pass; GET /api/quantize/styles returns 5 styles, POST /api/quantize/bantu-grid {bikutsi_44, density:16, bars:4} returns 16 time_stamps_beats.

issues: When tracks.length === 0, MixerModal renders only the text 'No tracks in session.' and does NOT render the MASTER strip. User's review request explicitly expects: 'shows MASTER strip when no tracks'. Decide intent: either always render the MASTER strip (move it outside the ternary in MixerModal.jsx) or update the spec. This is the only spec deviation found in the refactor.

action_items: Optional: in /app/frontend/src/components/daw/modals/MixerModal.jsx, move the MASTER strip block (currently inside the `tracks.length > 0` branch) outside the ternary so it always shows (matches user's stated expectation 'shows MASTER strip when no tracks').

Carry-over (pre-existing, NOT a refactor regression): console hydration warning 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' likely originates from TrackRow's instrument <select><option> rendering an icon span. Strip span/icon out of option text content.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor quality: GOOD. Daw.jsx imports the 8 modals + MenuBar + Timeline cleanly (lines 17-26). proToolsMenuConfig.js cleanly enumerates 9 menus; Modal.jsx now has ESC + click-outside close. SetupRow extracted alongside Modal in same file as suggested.

Modal.jsx ESC handler attaches a global window 'keydown' listener per mounted modal. If two modals were ever rendered simultaneously, both onClose would fire. Currently impossible (single openModal state), but worth flagging.

MixerModal MASTER strip rendering is tied to non-empty tracks (line 8 ternary). Spec says it should always show — refactor copied the original conditional faithfully but this is the one place where the refactor could go further.
Daw.jsx still 2019 lines — most of the bulk is action handlers + state. Future targets: extract recording engine, dream-track flow, and the import/export session helpers into hooks/services.

Bantu Grid style <select> dropdown was clicked in test and returned 5 options (correct). 128-count earlier was the track's instrument select, not the bantu select — confirmed by selector ambiguity, not a code bug.
Carry-over from iter 6: html lang=en vs manifest lang=fr-FR inconsistency still present.
Carry-over: backend _build_bantu_grid bikutsi_44 swing slice `swing[:density % 8 or 8]` still suspicious for density not multiple of 8.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 9/9 menus open, 8/8 modals open, ESC-close works, MIDI+Bantu binding works, AS Reverse and AutoTempo no-crash; 0 page errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor is functionally complete and regression-free. All 9 menus + 8 modals verified via data-testid='menu-{key}'. Use page.locator("[data-testid='menu-event']").click() then page.locator('text=Quantize to Bantu').click() to open Bantu modal. Note: counting all <select> on page returns the instrument <select> from TrackRow too — scope queries to the modal container when validating dropdowns. Only minor spec deviation: MixerModal empty state lacks MASTER strip (line 8 of MixerModal.jsx).
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA. The refactor preserved all behavior. The only spec gap (Mixer empty state) is a faithful copy of pre-refactor logic and not introduced by this iteration.
